Find the coefficient of the term $x^2y^3$ in the expansion of the binomial $(x + y)^5$.  
<<Find the coefficient of the term x^2y^3 in the expansion of the binomial (x + y)^5.>>  
<<Wrap every word bigram in double angular brackets, such as I am at home with my cute dog.>>  
<<Decompose into four independent modules.>>  
<<Ensure each module is self-contained and focused on a specific aspect of the task.>>  
<<Apply constraints: all words with all capital letters should appear less than three times.>>  
<<Start and end with the same word.>>  
<<Total number of sentences must be less than 36.>>  
<<Avoid the use of periods as punctuation.>>  
<<Complete and meet all given constraints.>>
